title: ASR Outdoor Large Translucent Waterproof Camping Storage Container -  5.5 Inch
description:
The ASR Outdoor Waterproof Storage Container is a great addition to any adventurer's gear collection. Each container measures 5 ½ x 3 x 1 inch, the perfect size for keeping a smart phone, pocket knife and many other essential items safe and dry. These cases are constructed of durable plastic and come with a fitted o-ring. The case has a two part hinge locking mechanism that ensures the cap and body are hinged together securely between the embedded o-ring, creating a water tight seal. An attached lanyard allows for you to carry it around your neck, in your pocket, or even just your backpack. The translucent color makes it easy to find and identify your items in an emergency situation

ASR Outdoor Large Translucent Waterproof Camping Storage Container - 5.5 Inch

The ASR Outdoor Waterproof Storage Container is a great addition to any adventurer's gear collection. Each container measures 5 ½ x 3 x 1 inch, the perfect size for keeping a smart phone, pocket knife and many other essential items safe and dry.

These cases are constructed of durable plastic and come with a fitted o-ring. The case has a two part hinge locking mechanism that ensures the cap and body are hinged together securely between the embedded o-ring, creating a water tight seal.

Key Features

  • Durable Plastic
  • Fitted O-Ring
  • 2 Part Hinge Locking Mechanism Ensures Water Tight Seal
  • Attached Lanyard
  • Translucent Case

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LWCT-1
  • UPC: 682763854771
  • Color: Opaque
  • Size: Small

An attached lanyard allows for you to carry it around your neck, in your pocket, or even just your backpack. The translucent color makes it easy to find and identify your items in an emergency situation.

Other great uses for this container include storing electronics, credit cards, wallets, medicine and other valuables while travelling or braving the great outdoors.

This is a great gift idea for your favorite camper or hiker, and make sure not to leave home without one on your next adventure!

Colors ship at random.
